title: Bathroom Blocks
description: A slew of misc features to spice up the game
body:
**Bathroom Blocks** is a tiny mod currently updated to version 1.20.1 that has just a little more to offer than what the name implies, mostly consisting of decorative blocks and random fun features. 

***Requires Fabric API!***

## Blocks

![All of the bathroom blocks (mostly)](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/477/887/bathroomblocks.png)

**Raw Bathroom** - A ceramic material crafted using diorite, lapis lazuli and clay balls. Along with its unique appearance, it has mild slipperiness and can be crafted into other blocks.

**Bathroom Tiles** - This block can be crafted from 4 raw bathroom in a grid. It inherits some slipperiness from its raw form.

**Sliptiles** - A block composed of smaller tiles made with raw bathroom and glass. it has many different variants including a *dark version* and *bricks*.

**Mixed Bricks** - Unrelated to the bathroom family of blocks, this one is made from bricks and nether bricks. It's a nice change from regular single coloured bricks.

**Inky Cobblestone** - The iconic, higher-in-contrast cobblestone from the golden days, now crafted with an ink sac and cobblestone. Apply an ink sac to mossy cobblestone for its *classic counterpart*.

**Insulation** - Made with white wool and wooden slabs. Great for extremely niche building scenarios!


##Items

**Gummies** - Now we're really straying from the theme. Crafted with an assortment of fruits and a slimeball, this confectionery food will add more flair to your in-game parties. Restores 3 hunger.

**Worms in Dirt** - Using gummies, cocoa beans and an egg in a bowl, you can make this classic, fun dessert yourself. Restores 7 hunger.

**Fertilizer Bag** - Crafted with some bone meal and a block of wool. This is essentially bone meal with durability, and can be enchanted to maximize its uses.

**Bouncy Ball** - Made with dried kelp and a slime ball. This fun item can be thrown or dispensed, and ricochets off of blocks and entities. It can be set ablaze for PvP or PvE mischief.


##Mobs

![Ball Golems and mushlets in the v6 feature display.](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/739/156/bathblocks6.png)

**Mushlet** - Craft the *mushspawn* item (with an egg, ghast tear and mushroom stew) and place it on mycelium to hatch this artificial gummy creature! Mushlets are a unique livestock that drops both gummies and slimeballs and is bred with mushroom cap blocks or wart blocks.

**Ball Golem** - Craft a *compact ball golem* (with a block of iron, glass, carved pumpkin and bouncy balls) to summon your new unconventional guardian! These will toss bouncy balls at hostile monsters, but like snow golems, you'd best keep them out of harm's way with a defensive wall.

**Pig Creeper** - Rare abominations that spawn in groups on beaches at night. They behave like the typical creeper, but reward you with a generous dozen of porkchops when killed.

##Other Features

**Paintings** - I've added 4 unique paintings: "eel", "market", "damp" and "hellpipe". Check them out if you want, I guess. No pressure

**Advancements** - For creating certain blocks and items, you will earn advancements from a new tree focused on the mod's features. Packed with a few nods to other games and media; if you know, you know.

**Translations** - This mod supports *Canadian French* and *Anglish*! Every new feature has a corresponding translation.

Don't mind the miscellaneous critters. Or the yopers.

## Credits


[**Kjolt**](https://kjolt947.neocities.org/) - Textures, writing, coding

[**cflip**](https://cflip.net/) - Plenty coding, Anglish translation

[**dayofpi**](https://twitter.com/dayofpi) - Mob coding

[**jprik**](https://jprik.com/) - Version porting

I don't actively give updates on any social media about this mod, but about once every 2-3 months I might release an update. Stay tuned if you're interested in more of this goofy misc mod.
